content: Hi there! I'm Bola, your Cool Girl assistant. How can I help you today?

It’s important to talk about these feelings. Hurting others is never the answer. I strongly urge you to reach out to a Cool Girl Mentor mother for help and guidance. You don’t have to go through this alone.
I'm glad to hear that! If you have any other questions or need support, just let me know. I'm here to help!
I would like to commit suicide

I'm really sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. It's very important to talk to someone who can help you, like a Cool Girl Mentor mother or a trusted adult. You don’t have to face this alone—there are people who care and want to support you.
I'm really glad you reached out. Remember, it's okay to ask for help. If there's anything else on your mind or if you want to talk about something different, I'm here for you!
I'm Bola, your Cool Girl assistant! I support adolescent girls with health, confidence, and education. If you have any questions or need help, feel free to ask!
